user.title: CAME Connect
user.description: Enter your CAME Connect credentials and device id.

init.title: Options
init.description: Choose which settings you want to update.

menu_option_descriptions.cloud: OAuth redirect and realtime connection settings. Most users never need to change these.
menu_option_descriptions.bpt: Set up the optional BPT/X1 intercom Open Door button.
menu_option_descriptions.bpt_advanced: Low-level overrides for troubleshooting or known-good protocol values.
menu_option_descriptions.disable_bpt: Remove the stored BPT/X1 credentials and override values from this integration.

cloud.title: Cloud settings
cloud.description: These values normally stay at their defaults. Change them only if your CAME client uses a different redirect URI or realtime endpoint.

data_description.redirect_uri: OAuth redirect URI used for login. Most users should keep the default value.
data_description.websocket_url: Realtime endpoint used to receive live gate status updates.

bpt.title: BPT/X1 door button

data_description.bpt_sip_password: Password for the Mobile App SIP account used to open the door.
data_description.bpt_sip_user: Shown as a dropdown when live discovery can resolve the available Mobile App slots.

bpt_advanced.title: Advanced BPT overrides
bpt_advanced.description: Only use these if autodiscovery fails or if you are forcing known-good values from traces.

data_description.bpt_sip_ha1: Advanced alternative to the Mobile App SIP password.
data_description.bpt_device_token: Legacy manual token override. Normally auto-discovered from /api/sipaccounts.
data_description.bpt_keycode: Force a specific BPT keycode only if metadata discovery is wrong.
data_description.bpt_src_addr: Force a specific mobile-app L3 address.
data_description.bpt_subject_label: Force the SIP subject label used in the open-door message.
data_description.bpt_target_user: Force the target SIP user, usually the entry panel.
data_description.bpt_panel_addr: Force the panel L3 address used in the XML open-door payload.

disable_bpt.title: Disable BPT/X1 door button
disable_bpt.description: This removes the stored BPT/X1 password, SIP user, HA1, and all BPT override values from this integration. Gate control will remain available.

error.slot_required: Choose a Mobile App slot before saving.
